topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Navigation. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Navigation is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Navigation in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Navigation snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Navigation?
How does Navigation handle memory management?
